ghostwriting: I have an idea and need someone to write the whole book
I need a professional writer to turn interviews into a manuscript
I want help creating a complete memoir from my notes
The manuscript does not exist yet and I need it written
I need a book written under my name from an outline
editing_proofreading: The book is already written and needs editing
I need grammar and style cleanup before publishing
I want a professional editor to improve the manuscript
The draft is complete but rough and needs polish
cover_design_illustration: I need the outside visual design of the book
I want custom artwork for the book jacket
My book needs a professional front cover and spine
I need cover files for ebook and print retailers
I want illustrated artwork for a picture book
interior_formatting: The manuscript is written and needs to be laid out for print and ebook
I need the inside pages designed and formatted
I need an EPUB and print-ready PDF
My book needs chapter styling and table of contents
I want accessible readable ebook structure
audiobook_production: I want my book turned into an audiobook
I need narrator selection and mastered audio files
I need voice talent and audio editing
publishing_distribution: I need help uploading my book to Amazon and IngramSpark
I need metadata categories and ISBN guidance
I want my book distributed to retailers
I need support setting up ebook and paperback publishing
I need help with self-publishing platforms
marketing_promotion: I need help promoting my book after publication
I want a launch campaign and reader outreach
I need ads and publicity for my book
I want help getting visibility without fake guarantees
I need marketing strategy for a book release
author_website: I need a website for my author brand
I want a site with book pages and newsletter signup
I need an online home for readers
I want to sell books directly from my website
I need an author landing page
video_trailer: I need a promotional video for my book
I want a cinematic trailer for launch
I need a vertical reel and YouTube trailer
I want animated motion graphics for a book promo
I need subtitles voiceover and music for a trailer
greeting: The user is opening the conversation or greeting the assistant
service_question: The user wants to understand services or fit
pricing_question: The user is asking about cost or a quote
timeline_question: The user asks how long the work will take
portfolio_request: The user wants proof or examples of previous work
consultation_request: The user wants a human consultant or meeting
nda_request: The user asks about confidentiality or an NDA
agreement_request: The user wants contract or service agreement handling
revision_question: The user asks about revision policy
payment_question: The user asks how payment works
publishing_platform_question: The user asks about specific publishing platforms or metadata
manuscript_status_update: The user gives manuscript readiness information
contact_info_provided: The user provides contact or identity details
complaint_or_objection: The user raises an objection or complaint
ready_to_buy: The user is ready to start the process
unclear: The user is ambiguous or not yet committed
spam_or_abuse: The message appears spam or abusive
off_topic: The user asks something outside BookCraft sales scope
